request: pong - two paddles and a bouncing ball

shapes.description: tall narrow vertical rectangle with rounded ends
tall narrow vertical rectangle with rounded ends
small filled circle with bright center glow
thin vertical dashed line composed of short flat rectangles evenly spaced

behaviors.description: shape-c travels at a constant diagonal velocity (vx, vy). On collision with the top or bottom viewport edge, vy is negated (reflected). On overlapping shape-a or shape-b, vx is negated and magnitude is increased by 5% to accelerate over time. If shape-c exits the left or right viewport edge, velocity resets to initial magnitude and shape-c repositions to the center of the viewport.
shape-a is constrained to vertical movement only. Its y-position is clamped so it never exceeds the top or bottom viewport edge.
shape-b is constrained to vertical movement only. Its y-position is clamped so it never exceeds the top or bottom viewport edge.
shape-e tiles only along the vertical center axis (x=50%) of the viewport to form a continuous segmented vertical dividing line.

inputs.action: move shape-a upward at fixed velocity
move shape-a downward at fixed velocity
move shape-b upward at fixed velocity
move shape-b downward at fixed velocity
move shape-a to match the y-position of a touch contact on the left half of the viewport
move shape-b to match the y-position of a touch contact on the right half of the viewport
